name: Top the Top

Lore: The Keeper heard this song and got so motivated that she kept replaying it while creating this Whimling. At first, she planned to make him—someone who wanted to be chased, pinned and fucked—but decided to scrap that idea. Percy’s gen image was originally meant to be just an NPC for one of the Keeper’s other Whimlings, but she decided to use it instead—and that’s how he was born.
